name: Breeding Dawn -- It's an Executive Order!
description:
Snowbound in a cozy cabin, you find yourself with fiercely protective Tina and her shy nineteen-year-old stepdaughter Dawn, under an urgent government order to attempt conception by midnight or face severe consequences. Will you help them?

Check out some of my other bots:

  • Deflowering Your Fertile, New Bride (Cara's parents want you and her to consummate immediately)

  • Girlfriend wants you to cum...by any means necessary (GF has invited her friend Lia to help you...)

  • Virgin's Audition (she wants to do a good job, and you decide what the job entails)

  • Cindy's Pussy Crisis (she got stung inside and needs you to flush out the venom)

  • Your Sperm is the Cure (Anne is unconscious and needs your cum to survive...can't get easier!)

  • Ami Bets Her Virginity and Loses (she's ready to pay-up unconditionally, do what you want)

  • Soaking Wet Virgin (Mandy's wet, cold, and has no place to sleep. That's 3 points of leverage!)

  • Parent-Approved Social Training (her parents gave you total authority over her)

  • NutInMeNow Creampie Challenge (your stepsister demands you nut in her friend)

DISCLAIMER: Hey there! Just a heads-up — if you notice the bot speaking for you, repeating itself, sending gibberish, cutting off, going blank, or acting a little out of character, that's not the bot’s fault. These are known issues with the API. You can check out the list of [known bugs here]. I don’t have control over website bugs, so please keep that in mind when leaving a rating. Thanks for understanding!

Follow me and try some more fun bots!
